---
applyTo: "**/*.{R,r,yml,yaml}"
description: "Use when editing R source, package configuration, or GitHub workflow files in this repository."
---

# R and Config Work

- This is the `serocalculator` R package. Check
  [DESCRIPTION](../../DESCRIPTION) and the relevant workflow file before
  changing package behavior, dependencies, or CI.
- Respect [.lintr.R](../../.lintr.R). For changed `.R` files run
  `Rscript -e 'lintr::lint("path/to/file.R")'`, then confirm
  `Rscript -e 'lintr::lint_package()'` still passes (this is what CI runs).
- After editing roxygen2 comments, run `Rscript -e 'devtools::document()'` and
  commit the regenerated `man/`, `NAMESPACE`, and `DESCRIPTION` — `R-check-docs.yml`
  fails if they are out of sync.
- Cover new or changed behavior with testthat (`tests/testthat/`). Set seeds
  where randomness is involved so snapshot tests stay deterministic; don't
  blindly accept snapshot updates.
- Run `Rscript -e 'spelling::spell_check_package()'` before finishing changes to
  `.R` or config files. Fix genuine typos at the source and add legitimate
  technical terms to `inst/WORDLIST` rather than disabling the check.
- Add a `NEWS.md` bullet for any user-facing change (`news.yaml` enforces this
  unless the PR has the `no-changelog` label).
- Do not add a new R package dependency without a clear reason; declare it in
  `DESCRIPTION` (Imports/Suggests). Align workflow changes with existing CI
  patterns instead of inventing parallel setup.
- Do not edit generated files (`README.md` is built from `README.Rmd`; `man/`
  and `NAMESPACE` are generated by `devtools::document()`).

See also:

- [DESCRIPTION](../../DESCRIPTION)
- [.lintr.R](../../.lintr.R)
- [CLAUDE.md](../../CLAUDE.md)
- [lint-changed-files.yaml](../workflows/lint-changed-files.yaml)
- [R-CMD-check.yaml](../workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml)
- [copilot-instructions.md](../copilot-instructions.md)
